# Allowlist of URL hosts that may appear in SKILL.md bodies.
#
# One host per line. Exact match or subdomain match
# (e.g. `example.com` matches `example.com` and `foo.example.com`).
# Lines starting with `#` are comments. Blank lines are ignored.
#
# Checked by `scripts/check_skill_safety.py`. Any URL in a SKILL.md body
# whose host is not on this list is a CI failure — either add the host here
# deliberately, or remove the link.

# Agent Skills open standard — referenced from SKILL.md bodies to point
# readers at the specification this repo builds on.
agentskills.io

# Anthropic documentation and help — referenced by skills that describe
# Claude capabilities or point contributors at official docs.
docs.claude.com
docs.anthropic.com
support.anthropic.com
support.claude.com
www.anthropic.com
anthropic.com
claude.ai

# GitHub — referenced for releases, issues, and repository links within
# this marketplace.
github.com
